D:\program\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\seal.dir/objects.a
D:\program\MinGW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\seal.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\seal.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\program\MinGW\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\seal.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\seal.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libseal.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\seal.dir\linkLibs.rsp
